texto: I think I’m coming up on the ess curve, so I’m going to hang up and concentrate on driving. In the snow. Which wasn’t supposed to happen until tomorrow afternoon.Gee, Kels, I didn’t know you believed in the weatherman. Do you still believe in Santa and the Tooth Fairy, too? How about the Easter Bunny?All right. Point taken.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Lani Aames que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “I think I’m coming up on the ess curve, so I’m going to hang up and concentrate on driving. In th…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, humorous, think, com foco em reflexao.
